scope: custom: core_engine + combat + derived_stats -- R4 full-channel equal-value sweep (armature reset 2026-05-29)
note: Executes Jordan's directive (wire as required + all attributes equal value). Wires the full sigma-leverage stack (Agi initiative+tempo+facing[M7]+reaction[M5]; Reading[Cog/Att]) into a DECISIVE one-phrase exchange and tunes Class-C seeds toward equal value across combat-active attributes. FINDING: C-04 stays closed; decisive frame tamed End's R3 attrition dominance (63%->66%, now co-equal with Agi not runaway); Reading reached parity (46%, in-band); but STRENGTH is structurally dead (23%, loses to everyone) because it brings +0.00 sigma-leverage (only damage) and in a decisive duel LANDING decides, not magnitude. Equalising Str needs a LANDING/CONTROL channel (bind/stagger/armour-defeat-opens-window/decisive-by-damage) = a NEW MECHANIC = Jordan design decision, NOT a Class-C knob. End's residual co-dominance is canonical Health depth (PP-716/717) = Jordan canonical decision. Class-C seeds LOCKED at best-balanced (spread 43pp). Canonical Health/damage/degree NOT altered. Reuses R1/R2/M3/M5/M7 (already ledgered). Class A = canonical budget/degree; Class C = channel-wiring + decisive-frame seeds (tuned, sim-tunable, NOT canon); Class M = sweep-method stats. PROPOSAL -- no canon edited; the sweep is the tuning oracle and the finding is the deliverable.

entries.quoted_text: Point pool at creation: 31 points across 10 attributes. Minimum 1 per attribute.
Creation max: 5 (one attribute only; all others <= 4).
Overwhelming | Net >= 2x Ob AND net >= 3 -- the decisive-quality strike.

entries.class: C-proposed (channel-wiring seed; tuned toward equal value; NOT canon)
entries.quoted_text: Agi initiative edge per point off average = LEVEL_SIGMA[minor]/4 = 0.0625 sigma-units; tuned down across passes (initiative was over-rewarding Agi). Minor=0.25 is the canonical level anchor; the /4 divisor is the Class-C seed.

entries.class: C-proposed (channel-wiring seed; tuned toward equal value; NOT canon)
entries.quoted_text: Reading dsig per mental (Cog/Att) point off average = LEVEL_SIGMA[minor] = 0.25; raised across passes to bring the mental channel to parity (now 46%, in-band).

decisive sub-action Ob = 3 (a Difficult sub-action; the phrase resolves on strike quality + felling, not attrition). Ob scale is canonical; the choice of 3 for the decisive sub-action is the Class-C seed.

a 6-10s phrase = a few exchanges; 5 sub-actions long enough for Str's per-hit damage to convert against End's wound-gate depth while remaining a phrase, not attrition. Jordan fixed the 6-10s phrase; the sub-action count is the Class-C seed.

commit depth 4 (toward Committed/Full, M5 depth scale 1-5 centred at 3) for the decisive strike; feeds M5 reaction_sigma and M7 facing advantage. Depth scale is M5 (Class-B); the choice of 4 is the Class-C seed.
trials per matchup at the M8/M8b harness scale (N=2000-4000); Wilson CI shrinks with N.
95% CI z-score 1.96 for the Wilson score interval; standard statistic used by the M8/M8b sweeps.
archetype matchups 40-60% (skill §8.8 band), no inversion, no non-viable baseline build.
